nasb.text: “Therefore behold, the days are coming,” declares the Lord, “When I will punish her idols, And the mortally wounded will groan throughout her land.

esv.text: “Therefore, behold, the days are coming, declares the Lord, when I will execute judgment upon her images, and through all her land the wounded shall groan.

cnv.text: 因此，看哪！日子快到， 這是耶和華的宣告。 我必懲罰巴比倫的偶像， 在巴比倫全境到處都有被刺傷的人在唉哼。

ccb.text: “看啊，时候将到，我要惩罚巴比伦的神像， 使巴比伦到处都是受伤者的呻吟。 这是耶和华说的。
